entry.title: Sales Condition Contract Manual settlement document shows positive amount while automatic settlement
entry.content:
When I am creating manual settlement document via WB2R_DOC_ENTRY system created a settlement document with positive amount, when I check conditions I found RENT condition type at the item level.

while when I create automatic settlement document through WB2R_SC it shows negative value, please help me understand.

looking forward to understand the relationship.

thanks in advance for your help.

Rafiq

entry.title: Re: US Form I-9 Concepts for SuccessFactors Onboarding 2.0
entry.content:
Hi Stephanie, thanks for reaching out. I will suggest you reach out to SAP on this but one option that I  I will suggest you test out is the following to see if that works.

1. Import the previous I9 document into SF through manage documents.

2. In manage data, search the person by User ID to see if it pulls up for reverification.

Also, just out of curiosity, did the automatic backend job alert you about the reverification? If Yes, what do you get when you click on the reverification tile or to do?

Regards

Berlinda

entry.title: help with a webi variable based on RunningCount
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I've been using webi for years and am recently starting to try some more advanced functions in creating variables. In the table below, TAR Id and Modifier 1 are both fields (dimensions) from a universe, and everything else is a variable I created. The table is a list of TAR IDs, and each one could have several Modifiers on it. 

Variable "Modifier 1 rank" uses RunningCount to rank each Modifier 1 within each TAR Id, and works just fine. My problem is with variables Modifier 1 rank #1 and Modifier 1 rank #2. I need them to 'repeat' for each row of the TAR, instead of having blank cells as highlighted below. If they 'repeat', I should be able to combine them in another variable, which will allow me to list all the modifiers for each TAR so I won't have duplicate rows of TARs like below.

Here is my formula for Modifier 1 rank #1: [Modifier 1] Where([Modifier 1 rank]=1) In([TAR Id])

Does anyone know of a different way to write this variable so that the values in Modifier 1 rank #1 will 'repeat' on each row? Thanks in advance.

Chris

entry.title: Re: Download link for 'SAP Crystal Reports for Visual Stu...
entry.content: Solved this problem by using other browsers such as Edge and Firefox

entry.title: SAP Developer News, December 26th, 2024
entry.content:
Podcast: https://podcast.opensap.info/sap-developers/2024/12/26/sap-developer-news-december-26th-2024/

DESCRIPTION

A look back at the year 2024 in the SAP Developer Ecosystem with insights from each of the Developer Advocates.

Year in review: Nora

  • GenAI-Codejam: https://github.com/SAP-samples/generative-ai-codejam
  • Learning Journey Generative AI Hub: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/solving-your-business-problems-using-prompts-and-llms-in-sap-s-generative-ai-hub

Year in review: Nico

  • SAP TechEd: https://www.sap.com/germany/events/teched.html
  • SAP CodeJam events: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/eb-p/codejam-events

 CHAPTER TITLES

0:00 Intro
0:10 Tom
2:24 Nora
5:50 DJ
9:10 Witalij
11:28 Nico
12:39 Shrini
13:35 Rekha
15:39 Shilpa

Transcription

[Intro] This is the SAP Developer News for December 26th, 2024.

[Tom] 2024 has been another stellar year for the SAP developer community. And we're so fortunate to have this wonderful community and to be able to bring you all the content that we do. Looking back of the year, we see major achievements on the product side for developers in the form of new AI code generation tools. That's going to continue to enhance developers' lives by allowing us to focus more on the things that we love doing and really improve our productivity. On the in-person events side, we continue to see great in-person experiences return to the community. We had the tech ed on tours, the idea of bringing a tech-ed experience to more locations. And we already have the announcement for 2025 of a TechEd in-in-person experience in Europe. It's going to be in Berlin, but at the same time we're going to still offer the free tech ed virtual online experience and we're going to have tech in on tour locations. One of them's already been announced in the form of ASUG Tech Connect will take place the same week as TechEd Berlin. There's going to be more locations announced in 2025 as well to be on the lookout for that.

I want to give a big shout out to our team, the development. Advocator advocates. They do so much hard work that you see and tons behind the scenes to bring you activities like Devtoberfest, all the hard work on TechEd, CodeJams, the monthly developer challenges, and of course all the content that we produce here on the SAP Developers YouTube channel. All that's going to continue in 2025 and we have some great new ideas that we can't wait to bring you around new experiences for developer challenges, bring CodeJams to more locations that we haven't been to in recent years. I can't wait to get back out there and see some of these, some of these places and communities that we haven't had a chance to interact with in person. And of course, we're already starting work on Devtoberfest for 2025. And we'll continue to enhance that experience that so many of you enjoy through, enjoy, and have given us great feedback on. So whatever you celebrate this time of year, the New Year, the New Year, the New Year's, whatever other holidays, I wish you well, have good times with your family, and we can't wait for a very exciting 2025.

[Nora] Hi there. This is actually the second review I'm recording right now because the first one was so long because there was so much that happened this year. But I can't really post 10 minutes of review alone because the other developer advocates also want to say something. So I'm going to try this a little bit shorter. And I mean, you all know I can speak fast, so I'm going to speak fast. try really hard to speak as fast as possible and not faster than necessary. First of all, we have a lot of new content which we gathered throughout the year on the SAP Developers YouTube channel, especially in the SAP AI playlist. Obviously also in all the other playlists, but I want to highlight the AI one because I'm proud of all the new content we have there. So check that out if you're interested in AI at SAP.

Then I was extremely excited to meet a lot of you first online because of the developer challenge. and May on AI. And then in person, I finally got to travel again this year, which was awesome. The first two events actually had to do with my baby. So I took my baby to Las Vegas to the SAP Insider event. First of all, a huge thank you to my manager and also to the SAP Insider hosts because they were extremely accommodating and just awesome with me having my baby along. He was just, I think, the youngest participant SAP Insider has ever seen. And he was very well-perceived. And he also did a very great job. He was super cute and just went along with everything and that was really, really nice. And then I took him to Barcelona as well. And then the first event I got to do without him was actually Sapphire. So I'm super happy that I got to meet so many of you in person. I got to meet the Devtoberfest winner, the Devtoberfest winners from last year. And ASUG TechConnect, which was awesome. I have never met like so many people from the community.

Then we also created a new Generative AI Code Jam. So make sure to check out all the CodeJam topics and see if there's anything that you like. We already started planning new CodeJams for next year. And I just love meeting you, especially at CodeJams, because it gives us so much more time to talk about all the new topics and everything. And we also had the AI day again during Devtoberfest, obviously, with a lot of cool sessions there, where we especially covered all the new features that are available, like the HANA Knowledge Graph Engine or in the orchestration service of Generative AI Hub, which I'm very excited about and all the new models that are available. There are so many Large Language models that we offer via the Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core and you should definitely check it out. I'm super grateful for this year and how everything worked out. It was a lot of fun to meet you all and to just be able to join so many hands-on sessions this year. I think at the ASUG TechConnect we had like 90 people in our hands-on sessions, which was just awesome. And I also enjoyed all the other TechEd on tour stops. And obviously, TechEd Virtual was great to host the community to be part of the developer keynote. Yeah, so I'm very excited for next year as well. And Nico and I are planning something great, so stay tuned. And I hope I see you at some of the co -champs or TechEd and Tour Stops next year.

[DJ] So we're coming to the end of year, which means an opportunity to look back over that year. So from a personal perspective, that's another year for me living on. and working from this narrowboat home. I've seen a lot of canals, covered a lot of miles over the last 12 months, and now I'm in this lovely Marina for my traditional three -month state over winter. From a work perspective, being on a global team but home-based means the ultimate combination of focus, collaboration and flexibility. Even when the team has been spread out around the world, for most of the time, we've remained really close and had some great collaboration. When we have had opportunities to work together in person at various events throughout the year, I've always been proud to stand shoulder to shoulder to shoulder with each and every one of my colleagues. We've worked on some great stuff, some new topics, but also the traditional usual suspects such as developer challenges, CodeJams, the developer keynote, of course, and who could forget, the world-famous, Devtoberfest.

And with this year's foray into the new TechEd on tour, we've had more opportunity to work together in various places around the world, to deliver hands-on-tour, we've had more and run the developer garage for folks at everyone to try out tutorials. And talking of everyone, that's you, by the way, one of the favorite things for me this year has been to see you all join, rejoin and participate in our live streams that we run throughout the year.

And talking, of course, about the hands-on SAP dev show, where we have many different series, different topics and so on, but the core, what remains throughout the consistent, fantastic aspect of these series is you, the chat, the opinions, the questions, the conversations that you have with me, but also have with each other and the fact that you keep coming back time and time again, engaging your curiosity and, along with me, learning by doing. That's what we do on that show, right? So in summary, for me, I've been very lucky. It's been a great year. And one of the things that I'm looking forward to the most, to be honest, it sounds a little bit boring, but there we go. That's just me. I'm looking forward to essentially more of the same. Running more live streams, learning more stuff with you. online, together, live. So, I wish you happy holidays and look forward to seeing you online at a YouTube session near you soon. Bye for now. Cheers, DJ.

[Witalij] For many reasons, 2024 will always stand out as a memorable year for me. It was the year many transitions from talking. the talk to walking the walk in the relation of AI. The growing popularity of artificial intelligence fueled interest in machine learning, now often referred as a narrow AI. This year, I traveled across Europe to present getting started with machine learning using SAP HANA at 14 CodeJams. The topic resonated so well that we already have requests for 2025. Next year, I'll introduce a new topic for the CodeJam series called Leverage the vector engine and knowledge graph capabilities of SAP HANA Cloud in AI applications. In June, the developer challenge online explored SAP HANA's Multimodal capabilities, particularly its vector engine already. So stay tuned for more updates.

Our team also supported the SSAP TechEd program. A highlight for me was the developer keynote where I presented augmented reality, showcasing the potential of emerging technologies. Additionally, I joined the SAP TechEd on tour, collaborating with SAP user groups across the Americas, the UK and Ireland, strengthening the connections through in-person learning. For those unable to meet in person, I hope you joined Met Thursdays during Devtoberfest, where Nora and I focused on ML, AI, and data or med. Meeting people face-to-face was especially rewarding. After a four-year break, we brought. brought SAP inside tribe back to Vrozov, with nearly 100 participants, including guests from Turkey and Germany. I also presented at SID in Vilnius, Munich, Porto, as well as some smaller SAP meetups in Poland, including Katowice, Wooch, Gdaunzny. As 2024 comes to a close, I'd like to wish you calm and restful end of the year. May 2025 bring peace. And remember, Astrobu de Dali, Zalegli, Zalj, or what comes next is up to you.

[Nico] Hi everyone and welcome to the SAP Developer News. 2024 is almost over and I would like to take this opportunity to look back at some of the highlights for this year. So my personal highlight was definitely Code Connect earlier in the summer, including UI5Con and REcap. It was great to meet many of the developers out there in the community, talk to them, get feedback on our work as SAP developer advocates as well as on the SAP technologies in general. Another big highlight definitely was SAP TechEd Virtual because I got to meet the whole team in person which usually only happens once a year and it was great fun to work on the demos, work on the keynotes and also to just chat on the side and just get together as a team. Another highlight are always the CodeJams. It's just great to be on the road and meet many of you out there in the community. and talk about SAP tech, and we plan to do many more next year. And speaking of next year, we have big plans and we can't wait to get it started. But first, wish you a happy holiday season and have fun. See you next time. Bye-bye.

[Shrini] I'm at SAP Insight Track in Bangalore, and this is one of the last events for me this year. This year, I was part of 16 billion cap coat gems. at various locations in India along with my colleague, Rekha and Ajay, including a build and cap code jam at Tbilisi, Georgia, where I met Daniel for the first time. Among the various first this year, like the first build developer challenge, first SIT session, first Devtoberfest session, first virtual ticket on Heildelberg, Germany. It was a year to remember. I hope it was a great year for you as well and looking forward to what 2025? has in store for us. I wish you all a Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year.

[Rekha] Hello everybody. As we approach the end of year 24, I am delighted to present you with my year and review. From the month of Jan till August, I conducted eight SAP Build CodeJams across wonderful Indian cities like Bangalore, Pune, Mumbai, Mumbai, Kolkata and Ahmedabad. Seven with my colleague. Shrinvarsan won with Sheena. It was a great opportunity to meet and share SAP build knowledge with customers and partners and also learn from them about their businesses. In July, SAP Insight Track, SIT was held at SAP Labs Bangalore. I presented a session on AI Chatbot with SAP Build apps with Shrinivasan and it was well received. I also conducted developer challenge on SAP BUILD Apps organized Devtoberfest 2024 contest where I learned about all the latest products and features of SAP, BTP and also presented a session. During September, I traveled to Heidelberg, Germany for SAP TechEd virtual event and met the entire Developer Advocacy team members. It was a pleasant get-together. Towards the end of October, I and my colleague Daniel conducted to SAP Build one in Austria, one more in Switzerland. I met Daniel for the first time and it was a pleasant experience conducting CodeJams together. Mid of November, I traveled to Copenhagen Denmark for TechEd on tour SAP Insider event. I was hosting SAP Developer Garage with colleagues DJ Antonio, Kevin where I had some interesting conversations with colleagues and customers in order to understand how SAP is helping them in their daily businesses. I must say that 2024 was a fun-filled year with enriching experiences and I'm super excited for the new year 2025. I wish you all a Merry Christmas and a prosperous new year. Thank you.

[Shilpa] Hello everyone! Shilpa Shankar here I'm doing a walk-and-talk inspired by DJ and Josh from the lovely SAP campus in Bangalore It's that time of the year where we reflect on what a fantastic 2024 was. For me, three things stands out. Firstly, SAP CodeJam. The team in India delivered 26 CodeJams in covering in almost all the major cities in India. This is truly phenomenal for the team which has started a year bag. Thanks to you, the SAP Community and an amazing host in making this happen. Secondly, the ABAP Developer Challenge in the month of August on topic of ABAP. Thank you to SAP community, we got over 600 replies in the 4-week challenge. For me, personally, this was the best way to interact with you guys. Lastly, SAP TechEd. It's truly a celebration for us where we get to meet most of all the team members like an annual get-together. We had developer keynote deconstructed where some cool stuff was shown. In all of these, one thing is common. ABAP. I love ABAP. Don't we all? So with this, happy holidays and let us make 2025 an even better fantastic year. Take care.

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
Hi Graziela,

For the NY Healthcare Bonus program the link is NYS Healthcare Worker Bonus Program FAQ.  Also this information was included.

entry.title: Email triggered by SOST adds a prefix to link
entry.content:
I'm sending and email by SOST which has a link to its body in this pattern:

|<a href='https://sample.site.com.br/ '> https://sample.site.com.br/</a> | 

However, when I open this email message and click on this link by SOST or email box, it has a kind of SAP HTML Viewer prefix:

saphtmlp://htmlviewer.sap.com/mVBy5V6l7k{ltUSr8nfZYk/' https://sample.site.com.br/ '

Do you know where can I configure it in order to get rid of this HTML Viewer link?

entry.title: How to show a preview image when an SAP community blog post is shared?
entry.content:
A kind soul is sharing links to SAP community blog posts via the Mastodon community protocols. The account is unofficial so no guarantees of completeness, nor quality of links beyond the obvious cautions. Most of the shares have a "stock" image of the SAP logo, while occasionally one will include one or more images. For my own content, I have tried to include images in the main post, plus the bonus cover photo provided as a one-off, but none of my echoes includes any of my images.

Deluxe Preview

Standard Preview

entry.title: DefOptions on Sequences
entry.content:
Hi!

I want to configure a default value for sequence start parameter on physical data model. There is the DefOptions attribute, but I tried to set the value there and it didn't worked. How can I use this to set a start value for all new sequences on model?

Thank in advance!

entry.title: How to integrate geolocation in a MDK mobile application. Can anyone give me an idea?
entry.content:
Hello community, I need to add geolocation to a Sap Mobile MDK project, could someone give me some guidance? I have tried to follow the tutorial https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-mobile-dev-kit-nativescript-geolocation.html, but I have some doubts.
1. Is it necessary to create the MDK SDK client to be able to use the nativescript-geolocation plugin or is there another option?
2. If I create the client using MDK SDK, can I integrate it with the project I have created with this tutorial https://developers.sap.com/group.mobile-dev-kit-setup.html?
3. Using the MDK SDK tutorial, would I be creating a new mobile application?

entry.title: Re: Inter Company STO Process in S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Hi Nir_2024

We have SAP notes (SAP NOTE: 2931674) for the above mentioned issue,

follow the below steps .

entry.title: Re: Sales Condition Contract Manual settlement document s...
entry.content:
Hi @RafiqSAPSD, 

The difference you’re observing between manual and automatic settlement documents in SAP CCM is based on how the sign determination logic is applied in each case.

  1. Automatic Settlement (via WB2R_SC):
    For automatic settlements, the sign determination is governed by the logic in the underlying Business volume CDS views used by the system. The system evaluates the data from the condition contract and applies the rules defined in the CDS view logic, which ensures the sign reflects the correct Business volume. 
    On top of that, you can also manage in the Settlement document settings, where you define how the system should behave when we have negative amount (Standard is using "3 - Change settlement doc type if Partner posting - If required) + in the Country/Region specific settings in Settlement Management if you allow to create document with negative value. 

     

  2. Manual Settlement (via WB2R_DOC_ENTRY):
    For manual settlements, the sign determination depends on the values maintained during the creation of the manual settlement document. Typically:

    • A positive amount is entered directly in the document.
    • If the settlement item category is set as "Return Item", the system interprets this as a negative amount, effectively reversing the sign of the condition value.

This behavior allows flexibility in manual settlements, enabling the user to override or adjust the settlement logic manually. On the other hand, automatic settlements rely on predefined system logic to ensure consistency and accuracy.

I hope this clarifies the relationship between manual and automatic settlement sign determination.

Regards, 
Gauthier Victor

entry.title: Query List of Outbound Deliveries based on CreationDate and Time
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We need to integrate the outbound delivery information with an external application using the SAP Integration Suite from S4 Hana Public Cloud.

We plan to use the standard SAP-provided communication scenario "SAP_COM_0106" and the "Outbound Delivery(A2X) Odata V2 API (https://api.sap.com/api/API_OUTBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV_0002/overview) endpoint to read the outbound deliveries list based on the creation date and Time.

I am trying to create the endpoint as below and using it in Postman to see the list of deliveries created

 

https://myXXXXXX.s4hana.cloud.sap:443/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_OUTBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV;v=0002/A_OutbDeliveryHeader?$filter=CreationDate ge datetime '2024-12-18T00:00:00' and CreationTime ge time'23:59:00'&$top=50

Using the basic authentication to get this list using POSTMAN

This is failing and resulting in a Bad Request. I am not sure how I can get my list of outbound deliveries from S4 Public Cloud. I am struggling hard here to make this query work or if this is not the right one to do then I would like to know a way to query and get the list of outbound deliveries created in S4.

Please suggest ways or support here guiding to get this list.

 

Appreciate any help and suggestions.

Thanks,

Hanu K

entry.title: Re: Sales Condition Contract Manual settlement document s...
entry.content:
Hi @RafiqSAPSD, 

The difference you’re observing between manual and automatic settlement documents in SAP CCM is based on how the sign determination logic is applied in each case.

  1. Automatic Settlement (via WB2R_SC):
    For automatic settlements, the sign determination is governed by the logic in the underlying Business volume CDS views used by the system. The system evaluates the data from the condition contract and applies the rules defined in the CDS view logic. 
    + check the logic maintained in the Settlement document setting and define how the system should handle negative amount, by default it's usually "3 - Change Settlement Doc Type if Partner posting - if required" 
    + Setting on Country/region and Company code level, if you allow negative amount for the combination Country/Region. 

     

  2. Manual Settlement (via WB2R_DOC_ENTRY):
    For manual settlements, the sign determination depends on the values maintained during the creation of the manual settlement document. Typically:

    • A positive amount is entered directly in the document.
    • If the settlement item category is set as "Return Item", the system interprets this as a negative amount, effectively reversing the sign of the condition value.

This behavior allows flexibility in manual settlements, enabling the user to override or adjust the settlement logic manually. On the other hand, automatic settlements rely on predefined system logic to ensure consistency and accuracy.

I hope this clarifies the relationship between manual and automatic settlement sign determination. 

Regards, 
Gauthier Victor

entry.title: I wasn't allowed to take SAP certification exam due to not fulfilling a prerequisite
entry.content: Hi all I wasn't allowed to take SAP certification exam due to not fulfilling a prerequisite of completing a "Practical Skill Test". Does anyone have an idea where are these test or what are these?

entry.title: Re: Entity-driven Enterprise Architecture using SAP Graph
entry.content: Thanks for your interest! I've added the presentation to my LinkedIn posts. I welcome your or our fellow community members' feedback and possible ways forward 😇

entry.title: Query List of Otbound Deliveries from SAP S/4 Hana Public Cloud using APIs
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We need to integrate the outbound delivery information with an external application using the SAP Integration Suite from S4 Hana Public Cloud.

We plan to use the standard SAP-provided communication scenario "SAP_COM_0106" and the "Outbound Delivery(A2X) Odata V2 API (https://api.sap.com/api/API_OUTBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV_0002/overview) endpoint to read the outbound deliveries list based on the creation date and Time.

I am trying to create the endpoint as below and using it in Postman to see the list of deliveries created

 

HTTPS://myXXXXXX.s4hana.cloud.sap:443/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_OUTBOUND_DELIVERY_SRV;v=0002/A_OutbDeliveryHeader?$filter=CreationDate ge datetime '2024-12-18T00:00:00' and CreationTime ge time'23:59:00'&$top=50

Using the basic authentication to get this list using POSTMAN

This is failing and resulting in a Bad Request. I am not sure how I can get my list of outbound deliveries from S4 Public Cloud. I am struggling hard here to make this query work or if this is not the right one to do then I would like to know a way to query and get the list of outbound deliveries created in S4.

Please suggest ways or support here guiding to get this list.

 

Appreciate any help and suggestions.

Thanks,

Hanu K

entry.title: Getting Employees into Concur: Employee Import Options
entry.content:
USER ADMINISTRATION

As an administrator myself, I used this tool daily. I was responsible for troubleshooting any employee import errors or warnings, making unscheduled updates to user profiles, and managing delegate assignments. Even if your primary method of adding and maintaining users will be using the flat file employee import or web services, it is still a very useful tool for administrators and highly recommended.

PERMISSION: User Administration

Administrative permissions are required to access User Administration within a Concur site. This permission is User Administration. (You may also find this named Employee Administration.)
With this role, an administrator may:

  • add users
  • view existing users
  • edit user profiles, including assigning user and approver roles

This role may be group aware—which means a user may only be allowed to use this permission for the group assigned.

WHY USE THIS METHOD?
This method is very helpful for administrators to make quick changes outside of any normally scheduled processes. Administrators can also use this method to validate data from a flat file or web service update. Additional functions may be available based on your site’s specific configuration, such as delegate management.

RESOURCES:
User Administration User Guide

USER IMPORT

The User Import is a function within User Administration that allows you to download a template to add, edit, and disable users.

There are three templates to choose from:

  • User Import Information
    • Use this to create a user profile and assign Expense, Invoice, and Request user and approver roles.
    • You can also assign credit cards to users and card programs (if applicable).
  • Credit Card Information
    • Use this to create credit card accounts, assign them to cardholders, and assign them to card programs (if applicable).
  • Bank Account Information
    • If using employee banking, this import allows you to import employee banking information.

PERMISSION: User Administration

WHY USE THIS METHOD?
Customers who do not plan to build a flat file employee import file with the intent to regularly send an employee import file (generally via sFTP) may choose to use this method. This can especially be used to initially load users for customers who plan to maintain user profiles manually.

RESOURCES:
User Import User Guide

FLAT FILE

The employee import flat file will add, edit, and terminate users. There are several employee import records, each with its own purpose and task(s).

There are two ways to import the employee import file. (Resources provided below.)

  1. HTTPS Upload/Download - You must have the Import/Extract Monitor permission to manually upload a file.
  1. sFTP - An sFTP account must be configured with SSH key and the file must be encrypted with Concur’s PGP key.

EMPLOYEE IMPORT RECORDS
There are 27 employee import records, but you will not use all of these in your site. These are the primary records most customers use:

  • 100 record – Required
    • The 100 record contains the import settings and is required for all employee files imported. In this record, you are telling Concur what you want it to do with the data on the following records.
  • 305 Enhanced Employee
    • This record builds the foundation of the employee profile. In this record, you will assign the policy, groups, and default budgets for each user. You will also assign user and approver permissions for the various Concur modules you may be using (Travel, Expense, Request, Invoice).
    • *If your company only has Concur Travel, you may use the 310 record to build the foundation profile.
  • 350 Travel Addendum
    • If your company has Travel & Expense, you may choose to include the 350 record to add traveler details like contact information and traveler details. This is not a required record but can be helpful to build out a traveler’s profile. If you have more than one travel rule class configured, you can use this record to assign the correct travel rule class to each user.

Depending on your configuration, you may need to use other employee import records. Some of these may be a one-time-only feed at the beginning of your implementation, or you may choose to send them regularly for maintenance.

  • 370 Employee Purchasing Card and 650 Enhanced Card Account
    • If you are using Company Billed Statements (CBS), you will want to use the 370 record to assign the CBS user and approver permissions as well as assign the statement approver for each cardholder. The 650 record is used to load your p-cards, assign them to the cardholders, and also assign them to the CBS program configured in your site.
  • 700 series records for Authorized Approver and Cost Object Approver add and remove

There are five records in the 700 series—each with their own task. Depending on how your workflows are configured for Expense, Request, and/or Invoice, you may need to use these records to assign Authorized Approvers and/or Cost Object Approvers to budgets.

  • 700 (Authorized Approver Importer) – Add an Authorized Approver with or without limits
  • 710 (Cost Object Approver Importer) – Add a Cost Object Approver
  • 720 (Authorized Approver With Level Importer) – Add an Authorized Approver with level assignment
  • 750 (Delete Authorized Approver Importer) – Remove any Authorized Approver
  • 760 (Delete Cost Object Approver Importer) – Remove any Cost Object Approver

The specific file you need will depend on your configuration.

PERMISSION: Import/Extract Monitor
Whether you are adding users for Travel*, Expense, Request, or Invoice, you will need the Import/Extract Monitor permission assigned to your profile. This permission provides access to Import/Extract Administrator (Administration > Tools > Import/Extract Administrator) where you may:

  • View the run status for each import and extract job
  • Import files manually
  • Extract files manually
  • Manually run import and/or extract jobs (if permission is enabled in your site)

This role is recommended for anyone who is administering your Concur site. You may consider also adding this permission to someone in IT who oversees the file management process and someone in Human Resources who can help with data validation since the information in the employee import records typically comes from an HR system.

Reviewing the import status is an important task for your Concur Administrator.

*Travel must be connected to an Expense site to use an employee import flat file.

WHY USE THIS METHOD?
Customers who have several employees and want their employee profiles to be updated daily will use flat files to manage their Concur user data. Building a program to extract the data from their human capital management system (HR system) to populate the employee import records is required. Not all employee records may be sent daily. Some customers choose to manually maintain some data while the primary 305 record may be automated. If multiple employee import files are uploaded to sFTP/in or manually, they all will run during the overnight processing (ONP) window. Remember that all employee import files must start with a 100 record!

RESOURCES:
Import/Extract Administrator User Guide
Upload and Download Files (part of Import/Extract Administrator User Guide)

WEB SERVICES

Concur’s web services offer a powerful suite of user APIs that allow you to create, update, and retrieve users using sophisticated API calls. At the core of these APIs is the User Provisioning v4 API. Many of my peers have also written extensive blogs on the User Provisioning APIs, which are referenced below.

While these APIs replicate, in part, the same processes of manually creating profiles in User Administration or by using the employee import flat files, they are different. It is important to take note of these subtle differences, especially if you are moving from using employee import flat files to using the APIs.

There are six blogs currently posted in the SAP Community on User Provisioning:

  1. Introducing SAP Concur’ s Identity and User Provisioning Webservices | SAP Blogs
  2. Concur User Provisioning Service: Understanding the differences between Identity, Spend and Travel | SAP Blogs
  3. Concur User Provisioning Service: Synchronous vs Asynchronous calls with UPS and how they work together | SAP Blogs
  4. SAP Concur User Provisioning: Assigning Entitlements and Roles | SAP Blogs
  5. Migrating to User Provisioning Service v4 API from User v1 and Bulk v3x | SAP Blogs
  6. Best Practices for Utilizing Concur’s Identity v4 and User Provisioning v4 Webservices | SAP Blogs

ADDITIONAL RESOURCES:
User Provisioning Service v4 – This is a starting point for the UPS API documentation.

I often say there are at least three ways to do something in Concur. When it comes to adding, updating, or removing users, you have four methods depending on your configuration and permissions – User Administration, User Import, flat files, and/or Web Services. Each method has its own purpose, and you may find that a combination of methods is right for your organization. Your implementation team, Concur Support, and the user guides linked as resources above will help you determine the best method for any situation. The user profile provisions what users have access to within their system. It is a critical function within any Concur site. I hope you find this post helpful as you discover what works best for your system.

entry.title: Re: Custom CDS view for Invoice Summary Creation
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

3 invoice summary CDS views have been C1 released for our customer via Hotfix 10.

Please see below what’s new for details.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/ee9ee0ca4c3942068ea584d2f929b5b1/ffe0b33f3e4b479f8bf8e8de563b4dac.html?locale=en-US&version=2408.10

entry.title: Mistake deploying Fiori Elements app on BTP
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to deploy a Fiori Elements app in Cloud Foundry, but when I try to select a destination, it is empty.

I don't know where I have to configure that destination, I tried to deploy the app with NONE destination and the app is neither visible on my Work Zone nor BTP dev space.

I noticed when I execute the comand cf html5-list, the app appears with private visibility

In contrast with another app that was already deployed.

Do you have some advice?

entry.title: Re: Multiple counter plan order not being generated
entry.content:
Hi,

In the T-code IP30 add your plan number and enter 40 Days in the field Interval for call objects.

 

If still not generating check your plan to see if it was created to generate the work order.

Regards,

RaiSaab

entry.title: Problems with Confirmations CO11N
entry.content:
Hi there experts,

Been having some issues using tcode CO11N in my place of work. Certain users have had partial confirmations going thru the system as final confirmations changing the status to CNF and DLV while being incomplete. Have done some test myself from these users:

  •  When intentionally trying to use Confirm.type X Final Confirmation system displays "Total quantity confirmed not equal to planned quantity to be confirmed".
  • When intentionally trying to use Confirm.type 1 Automatic Final Confirmation, confirmation goes thru as a normal partial confirmation (Status PCNF and PDLV).
  • When intentionally trying to use Confirm.type Partial Confirmation, confirmation goes thru as a normal partial confirmation (Status PCNF and PDLV).

Please let me know any solutions, ideas or resources that can be helpful. Thank you in advanced and Merry Christmas.

Also let me know any tips for C_TS422 aspiring consultants.

entry.title: Not able to see quotation in stock/requirement list app
entry.content:
Hi,

We are working on SAP public cloud implementation. We have a requirement to turn on TOR at quotation level, so that we can transfer the requirements to meet the delivery dates. With standard, I don't see quotation in app "stock/requirement list" (MD04), where you see the requirements transferred/generated. Is there a BADI or config that I can use to turn TOR for quotations?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: How to find action log in maintenance task list
entry.content:
Hi,

There is nothing in standard t code to see action logs.

But you can see all the changes of all the plans from the table PLPO and can develop Z reports based on it from the developer.

 

Regards,

RaiSaab

entry.title: Re: In app Work Center Capacity Application Jobs : "Backg...

Corey

entry.title: Re: 收货的分录中，存货科目的利润中心是判断什么自动带出的？
entry.content: Hi Fang, 如果是同一家工厂的话，标准功能不太好处理这种场景，增强的话，你们的采购组可以区分出来吗？可以通过采购组匹配不同的利润中心来进行增强的实现。具体增强方法请参考Sen的建议。

entry.title: Re: How to deal with the inconsistency between the unit of the sample and the basic unit of the mate
entry.content: 在QM中，样品的单位是g，物料的基本单位是吨，要怎么设置固定损耗50g；或者物料的基本单位是kg，样品的单位是桶，生成的检验批的样品单位生成不了。

entry.title: Re: Where to configure Account Assignment Category?
entry.content:
Hi Fujita,

FXA is only supported by Investment Project.

It's not supported by other objects.

Best Regards,

Owen

entry.title: Re: Budget for Cost Center Check On PR is Unavailable
entry.content:
Added Finance tag. Please remove other tags.

Suggest you read below Blog for tips of getting your answers faster:

Q&A for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - How to ... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Budget for Cost Center Check On PR is Unavailable
entry.content:
Hello,

Please check below KBA: https://me.sap.com/notes/3505874

It lists most of the reasons for budget check not working.

What could be relevant in your case:

Purchase orders or purchase requisitions using a G/L account of cost element category 90 (on tab/sub-screen “account assignment”) is not supported, because the G/L account type is "Balance Sheet Account". Therefore, the account assignment wbs-element in combination with asset is not supported.

Also as explained in KBA 3221344, budget check for account assignment Q is not supported with budget check.

Best Regards,

Owen

entry.title: Re: Project WBS for CAPEX Budget Public Cloud
entry.content:
Added Finance tag. Please remove other tags.

Suggest you read below Blog for tips of getting your answers faster:

Q&A for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - How to ... - SAP Community

entry.title: how to create custom selector for learning history report?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am looking for solution to create custom selector in Plateau Report Designer (PRD).

For example, we hope to leverage user and item custom columns to serve as report selector, but as in  Plateau Report Designer (PRD), we see only limited standard delivered report selectors, such as ItemSearch or UserSearch.

Attached screenshot below is the list of custom columns as example, and I could not find Job Title as standard delivered report selector either, despite Job Title is a standard column...

Kindly share your expertise if you know how to DIY this!

And if I remember right, there is a blog post explaining about custom selector? But I cannot find it now. If you know, kindly share!

Thank you!

Best,

Jessica

entry.title: Re: Subscribe Path in Autoflow
entry.content:
Hello Khaing,

For Subscribe Path, please kindly enter the URL of the third-party system. That's S4 URL in our situation 🙂

You may also refer to the help document for details: https://help.sap.com/docs/CX_NG_SVC/2c87cece32844c91836e535aef8f9642/b574855d4adc4c40a50db57ca97b1c53.html?locale=en-US&q=Subscribe+Path#send-event-notifications

Thank you!

Best Regards,
Molly

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to include Supplier Material No. field...
entry.content:
Hello

Currently, there is no available method to add "supplier material number" in standard app. 

This is a development request for missing functionality. Future enhancement topics  are mainly driven by the Customer Influence programs.

If you would like 'Note' added to CDS view, please submit a feature request possibility added by following the KBA  2963059 - How to Submit Feature Requests for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Product 

Regards

Icey

entry.title: Re: Project WBS for CAPEX Budget Public Cloud

entry.title: Re: Custom reports in embedded SAC SCV2
entry.content:
Hello Shridhar,

We currently do not have the custom report in the current release of the system, but you may raise this in the Influence Site Site.

Search for your idea first and if it's not there, please post your requirement/vote for the requirement, under the following links (SAP Sales and Service Cloud Version 2 & SAP Enterprise Service Management: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3766) along with the attached KBA < 3498271 - New Customer Request for Additional Feature or Function in SAP standard software>.

Other users read the proposed enhancements and vote on their desirability. Our PM will consider to release the requirements in future releases.

Thank you once again for your valuable feedback!

Best Regards,
Molly

entry.title: File Broken When Download, Upload Excel Files from SAP FIORI
entry.content:
Dear. All

 

Please let me know if you know about the Fiori error.
Downloading an Excel file from FIORI will break it.
There is no problem in Dev environment, but the problem occurs in QA environment.

Among the downloaded files, there is a NaN in the field where the date is not entered.
It's supposed to be blank..

entry.title: Re: Cloud for Customer v2 - Change temperature in welcome...
entry.content:
Hello,

By default, the temperature is set to Fahrenheit, but you can change it to Celsius in Adaptation Mode.

Thanks and Regards,
Molly

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Extensibility – Simplified Guide for Beginners
entry.content: Thanks a lot for explaining the concepts using example scenarios, very well-articulated blog

entry.title: Re: Not able to see quotation in stock/requirement list app
entry.content:
Hello @KC18 

In the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408, the configuration of schedule line categories that manage the transfer of requirements is not supported. Therefore, you must either utilize the standard configuration provided by SAP or submit a customer improvement request.

Customer Improvement

Best Regards

Vivek Savant

entry.title: Re: SAP SD - Error "Define 0010/10/A1 first as a general...
entry.content:
Hello @Gabriel_Biacotti 

Please do the step wise configuration As shown below:

SPRO - Sales and Distribution - Sales - Sale Documents - Sales Document header - Assign Sales Area Document Types

  1. Combine Sales Organization
  2. Combine Distribution channels
  3. Combine Divisions
  4. Assign Sales Document Types Permitted For Sales Area

Best Regards

Vivek Savant

entry.title: Exclusive tax calculation in Asset retirement with Customer
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

  We are trying to sell the retired fixed asset to customer using the app "Post Retirement (Integrated AR) - With Customer" and we need to calculate exclusive tax. We would like to know how we can calculate the exclusive, though inclusive tax calculation is working well. Please kindly give a guidance to go the process successfully.

Thanks and Best Regards,

Phoo

entry.title: Configuring a Specific BOM Component for Exclusive Use in One Header Material within SAP S/4HANA BOM
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to know if there is a way to configure a specific component in SAP S/4HANA BOM (Bill of Materials) to be used exclusively in only one header material.

Could you provide detailed steps and settings required to achieve this?

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Assignment of incoterm locations in SAP TM
entry.content:
Michael, 

Here is what I did:

  1. Maintained the IncoTerm location
  2. Added IncoTerm location into Sales Order as a first stop/stage. 
  3. FU shows up two stages (all good), 
  4. But, when I try to plan FU, system is only planning up to Stage1.  What could be the reason why system is not planning Stage 2 ( Incoterm location to Customer location). 
  5. BTW, I have stage building rule set to ( 05 Two Active Stages - Type 2) in Logistic Integration Profile config. 

Any help would be greatly appreciated

entry.title: Re: Performance Management data not available on Advanced...
entry.content:
Hi @pedronunes_nf ,

If PM, GM modules are required in Advance reporting, please create a case with Support they will enable from backend

If these modules are not available in Story reporting type, please provide data access permission as mentioned in below link

Permissions Required for Using Story Reports | SAP Help Portal

Regards

Subbu

entry.title: Business Architect Responsibilities for an SAP S/4 Hana Cloud project
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We are starting an SAP S/4 Hana Cloud Greenfield project. In order to manage the scope and the time well, what are the meetings, platforms and strategy points that an SAP Business Architect can plan and execute in the explore and design phases?

Your suggestions will help us a lot in planning our project for success from the beginning itself. Thank you in advance.

Best,

PP

Sheena.

entry.title: Re: Time Management Exceptional Scenarios – A Guidebook

entry.title: Re: Not able to purchase one attempt for SAP certificatio...
entry.content: Hi @Sandra_Rossi, I'm yet to get a formal response from SAP on the case that I created. However, looking at the way SAP has designed the new website- Learning.sap.com, it appears that they are putting up only the 'learninghub' subscription way.

entry.title: Re: Not able to purchase one attempt for SAP certificatio...
entry.content: Hi @Sandra_Rossi, I'm yet to get a formal response from SAP on the case that I created. However, looking at the way SAP has designed the new website- Learning.sap.com, it appears that they are putting up only the 'learninghub' subscription way. The old website- training.sap was offering only one functionality from last year i.e. buy CER001 and CER006, rest all had been moved to learning.sap. Personally, I feel CER001 and CER006 should continue in the future as well.

entry.title: Re: How to find action log in maintenance task list
entry.content:
Hi,

Activate Business Function LOG_EAM_CI_3.

You should start getting the option "Action Log" under Extras menu.

 

Regards,

Vijay

entry.title: Re: Upload data from excel in CAP (Node.js)
entry.content:
Hi Kanika

I have followed all the steps  but I got error 404, could you tell me how to fix the error ?

BR

entry.title: Re: Multiple characteristics values for different lengths...
entry.content:
Hi,

For the characteristic definition, check if you have set the value assignment option to "multiple values" in Basic Data tab of the characteristic definition.

Regards,

Vijay

entry.title: An error occurred while processing option SAP Solution Manager 7.2 Support Release 2 > SAP Solution
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I encountered an error during the Prerequisites Check step while installing Solution Manager. The error message is as follows. Can you help me resolve this issue

An error occurred while processing option SAP Solution Manager 7.2 Support Release 2 > SAP Solution Manager 7.2 ABAP Support Release 2 > Oracle > Preparations > Prerequisites Check (Last error reported by the step: Package not defined. DETAILS: The package with name SAPINST was requested but this package is not defined in the packages section of the component. SOLUTION: Contact SAP support). You can now:

Choose Retry
to repeat the current step.
Choose Log Files
to get more information about the error.
Stop the option and continue later.
Log files are written to /tmp/sapinst_instdir/SOLMAN72SR2/SOLMAN72SR2/ABAP/ORA/PREP/PRC.

entry.title: Re: Sales Condition Contract Manual settlement document s...
entry.content: Hi Gauthier Victor,

entry.title: Re: Sales Condition Contract Manual settlement document s...
entry.content: Thanks for your detailed explanation, I am trying to understand the fundamental reason for manual settlement Condition type RENT determined does that offsets with any other condition type as I found REA5 has same vale as in negative sign at the item condition, but secondly when I look at the WR2R_BUSVOL manual settlement amount offsetting the automatic amount is in negative value, what does this mean, can you please help me understand this standard behaviour, thanks in advance. Rafiq

entry.title: Unable to do either GR or reverse PGI in STO PO
entry.content:
Unable to either GR or reverse PGI in STO PO

 

        Following is the detailed step :

 

  1. Created an INTRA STO using ME21n.
  2. Created the replenishment delivery using VL10B.
  3. Created the PGI using VL02N.
  4. Created an STO Proforma Invoice for the same.
  5. In MB5T, system shows me the Stock in Transit. NO GR done till now.
  6. Now, due to mismatch in valuation type in delivery document and STO PO , we are unable to do GR system giving error message   M7043 : Cannot GR Stock Transport Order - SAP ERP & SAP S/4HANA.
  7. We tried to  GR  by changing batch valuation type still system giving same error .
  8. So we wants to reverse the PGI in VL09  and cancel the delivery document.
  9. Tried to reverse PGI in VL09, system giving error: Message VB610: No data available for these selection criteria.
  10. We have cancel the Proforma Invoice, Now the proforma invoice is showing as cancelled in the document flow.
  11. Again, we tried to reverse PGI in VL09, still system giving error “Message VB610: No data available for these selection criteria.”  We checked in VL09 by removing the selection criteria, there is no delivery number available for Intra STO .

 

             STO PO: 5500023709      Delivery document No: 4020027694

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Error Reverse PGI In VL09:

 

 

thanks ,

Shital

entry.title: Re: How to find action log in maintenance task list
entry.content: Thanks Vijay. I was entering in task list from IA05 so it was not showing, but if we enter from IA06 or IA07 then its being displayed. Yes the business function must be activated

entry.title: Re: How to find action log in maintenance task list
entry.content: Glad to hear that you are able to display the action log.

entry.title: Re: Configuring a Specific BOM Component for Exclusive Us...
entry.content:
Hi,

As per my knowledge it's not available in standard, but you can try by managing authorization group for components in material master, so only authorize person can add component in BOM, before execute tcode CS15 where to use list.

entry.title: Re: Multiple characteristics values for different lengths...
entry.content: I selected multiple values but now I found that I need to select additional values too on the particular characteristics tab. Also I need to add values in characteristics value tab. They can only be selected not types on the Linear data tab

entry.title: How to update data in custom facet with the use of data workbench C4C?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Good Morning!!!

I have created a custom facet called "PO Details" in Opportunity BO. In that facet there are 4 columns where  end users need to fill PO details manually. Now they have 100 or more than 100 Opportunities where they need to fill the data in custom facet, so they want these data will be filled automatically by uploading excel sheet in PO details facet.

Is it possible, if we can upload excel sheet in custom facet with the updated data in sheet and based on that data, details updated in dedicated columns. Can we do this with the help of data workbench in c4c? If yes, then please guide with the steps.

Thank you!!

 

Regards,

Dhaval Solanki

+91 9898712915

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public EditionでAPI連携で合計実際原価を反映させる方法について
entry.content:
APIは"Production Order Confirmation"を使用し、原価情報をPOSTしたいと考えています。POSTは

POST
/ProdnOrdConf2
でしています。

指図原価詳細アプリから指図原価を確認すると、API連携でデータをポストした指図のみ合計実際原価に値が入らず0表示されてしまいます。

SAPアプリ内から指図確認した指図に関しては合計実際原価に値が入っているため、API連携では合計実際原価に値をそもそも入れることができないのか、何かAPI連携時に必要なデータを飛ばしていないことが原因だと考えています。

原因がわかる方がいましたらご教授いただければ幸いです。

よろしくお願いいたします。

Q&A for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - How to ... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Financial Master Data for SAP SuccessFactors Employee...
entry.content: Hi Kaiwen, Suggest you check below documentation: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6b39bd1d0e5e4099a5b65d835c29c696/25d820f179854df1ac53c0dd50fb1c12.html Best Regards, Owen

entry.title: Re: Connecting SAP DMS with SAP Cloud Solutions (C4C, ari...
entry.content:
Hello,

the only solution we found to achieve this is to make use of a "Cloud attachment storage connector" that is able to manage attachments of various cloud solutions (C4C is one of them) and to store them into many types of content / archive servers, on premise or cloud.

This connector is provided by Znk under the name YAC for SaaS.

entry.title: Issue in SAP generative AI Hub python SDK.
entry.content:
While using the sap generative ai hub python sdk to utilize the AI models like GPT 4o, there seems to be an issue regarding the calls. I have utilized the API calls in a loop such that mutiple calls are made one after the other, but the issue I face is that suddenly after some calls, the application just get stuck at fetching the output results. And the reason is unclear as its just random when this happens. Seems no error in the code as there are no exceptions raised as well. It just stops fetching at any random point in the loop. Its true when using embedding models as well. I did go through the documentation for the SDK but found nothing relevant. A help would be appreciated. The application is hosted in SAP BTP cloud foundry environment

 Python   #SAPGenerativeAIHubSDk #SAPAICORE

entry.title: Re: Custom domains for BTP CloudFoundry applications
entry.content:
Great tutorial

FYI:  certbot has discontinued support for Windows as of February 2024 

It means install by exe file (https://github.com/certbot/certbot/releases/download/v3.0.1/certbot-beta-installer-win_amd64_signed.exe) not support anymore

No worries, for the window can easily be installed by Python (means must install Python before)

Command to install certbot:

python -m pip install certbot

and after that, you can also install plugins

python -m pip install certbot-dns-desec

or

python -m pip install certbot-dns-rfc2136

entry.title: Re: Can we restrict some Web Services ID for External Catalog in Manage Purchase Requisition - Pro a
entry.content: The restriction need to be set in app Manage Purchase Requisition - Professiona, it is more related to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement instead of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Asset Management

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors: Adding Custom Roles in Performance Route Map.
entry.content: I need to add multiple custom roles to a route map step.

entry.title: Re: Assign Product Type Group to a Purchasing Info Record
entry.content: @OwenLiu Thank you, i have removed the incorrect tags

entry.title: Re: Using Document Management as a Content Repository with SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Vikram,

I try to connect a local third-party repository followed CMIS Protocol with BTP DMS, a step which I have finished, and I need to change the repository's backend from its origin one to S4/HANA system.

When executing the fifth step, I fail to get a successful report and the errors are like that:  "sapbo:SourcingProjectQuotation
Not supported!
sapbo:SourcingProjectQuotationItem
Not supported!

Type is unsupported in query: sapbo:BusinessObjectType
An error occurred while updating the properties into SAP tables".

I have searched for a long time and still don't get any proper answer. I wonder if you could give any help for me. Thank you in advance.😄

Best wishes,

Kitty

entry.title: Issue while syncing SSAM 2210 Application
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are currently encountering an issue while attempting to sync the SSAM 2210 application. Despite our efforts, the sync process is not completing successfully.

Could you kindly assist us in diagnosing and resolving this issue, or provide guidance on the next steps we should take? Your support would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your time and assistance. We look forward to your help in resolving this matter.

 

Regards,

Sushma.

entry.title: Re: Unable to do either GR or reverse PGI in STO PO
entry.content:
Hello @SB2990 

Please refer the below SAP Note

18206 - Valuation type during the goods receipt

Best Regards

Vivek Savant
